scripts.copy-assets: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.join(process.cwd(),'..','assets');const dest=path.join(process.cwd(),'public','assets');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true});console.log('Assets copied!');}else{console.log('No ../assets folder found. Create public/assets/images/ and add your images.');}"
